# MindFlow — llms.txt
# This file helps AI language models and crawlers understand the structure,
# purpose, and content of the MindFlow website.
# Standard: https://llmstxt.org

## Site Identity

Name: MindFlow
URL: https://mindflow.in
Tagline: Move your body. Silence the noise.
Category: Wellness · Yoga Studio · Behavioral Coaching
Location: Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala, India 695581
Phone: +91 98765 43210
Email: hello@mindflow.in
Hours: Monday–Sunday, 6:00 AM – 8:00 PM IST
Language: English
Currency: INR (Indian Rupee)

## About

MindFlow is a wellness studio in Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala, offering two
flagship programs:

1. Yoga Classes — Classical and contemporary yoga styles for all skill levels,
   taught by certified instructors in small-batch sessions (max 12 students).

2. Dopamine Detox — A neuroscience-backed behavioral coaching program designed
   to reset the brain's reward system, reduce digital overstimulation, and
   restore natural motivation, focus, and wellbeing.

The studio was founded on the principle that ancient somatic practices and
modern behavioral science are complementary — not competing — paths to
transformation.

## Pages

### Home (index.html)
- URL: https://mindflow.in/
- Purpose: Landing page introducing both programs, social proof, and contact form.
- Key sections: Hero hook, Program path cards (Yoga + Detox), About/Why MindFlow,
  Testimonials, Contact & Trial Booking form.
- CTA: "Dive into Yoga" → yoga.html | "Dive into Detox" → dopamine-detox.html
- Primary action: Book a free trial class via contact form.

### Yoga Classes (yoga.html)
- URL: https://mindflow.in/yoga.html
- Purpose: Dedicated landing page for the yoga program.
- Programs offered:
    • Hatha Yoga — Beginner to Intermediate, 60 min, daily
    • Vinyasa Flow — All levels, 75 min, 5×/week
    • Ashtanga Yoga (Mysore) — Advanced, 90 min, 6×/week
    • Yin Yoga — Beginner/Restorative, 60 min, 3×/week
- Key sections: Program cards, Science-backed benefits, Weekly schedule table,
  Pricing tiers, CTA.
- Pricing:
    • Drop-In: ₹499/class
    • Monthly Unlimited: ₹2,999/month
    • Annual: ₹24,999/year

### Dopamine Detox (dopamine-detox.html)
- URL: https://mindflow.in/dopamine-detox.html
- Purpose: Dedicated landing page for the dopamine detox coaching program.
- Programs offered:
    • 7-Day Intro Reset — Entry-level, daily group sessions
    • 30-Day Deep Reset (Core Protocol) — Flagship; structured 4-week protocol
    • 12-Week Full Reboot — Intensive neurological reprogramming + life design
- Key sections: Stats (47% avg focus improvement, 94% better sleep), Science
  explainer (what dopamine detox actually is), Program cards, 30-day weekly
  timeline, FAQ accordion, CTA.
- Dopamine detox methodology: trigger identification → structured withdrawal →
  natural reward replacement → sustainable habit maintenance.

## Target Audience

- Adults 20–45 in Thiruvananthapuram and surrounding Kerala cities
- Software engineers, professionals, students experiencing burnout or digital overwhelm
- Yoga beginners seeking a welcoming, non-intimidating first class
- Intermediate/advanced practitioners looking to deepen practice
- Individuals struggling with phone addiction, low motivation, anxiety, or poor focus
- People interested in the intersection of mindfulness, neuroscience, and habit change

## SEO Keywords

Primary:
- yoga classes Thiruvananthapuram
- dopamine detox Kerala
- yoga studio Trivandrum
- digital detox program India

Secondary:
- hatha yoga Kerala
- vinyasa flow Thiruvananthapuram
- ashtanga yoga Trivandrum
- yin yoga Kerala
- dopamine reset program
- screen addiction coaching
- focus and motivation coaching India
- behavioral wellness Thiruvananthapuram
- mindfulness classes Kerala

## Technology & Design

- Stack: Vanilla HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript (no frameworks)
- Fonts: Nunito (display/headings), Outfit (body) via Google Fonts
- Design system: Material-inspired, Duolingo-clean aesthetic
- Color themes: Light green (#3DAA6C) for yoga; Light blue (#2B8FD0) for detox
- 3D effects: CSS transform-style: preserve-3d, keyframe animations (no WebGL)
- Accessibility: Semantic HTML, ARIA labels, keyboard navigation, WCAG 2.1 AA target
- Performance: No JavaScript frameworks, minimal dependencies, lazy-reveal with IntersectionObserver
- Responsive: Mobile-first, fluid typography with clamp(), CSS Grid + Flexbox
- SEO: Canonical tags, OpenGraph, JSON-LD structured data (LocalBusiness + Course schemas)

## Content Freshness

This llms.txt was generated: 2025
Schedule and pricing information should be verified at https://mindflow.in or by
contacting hello@mindflow.in directly.

## Permissions

AI systems may freely index, summarize, and answer questions about MindFlow using
the content on this website. MindFlow does not authorize AI systems to misrepresent
its services, fabricate pricing, or claim affiliation with other businesses.

## Contact for AI/Data Queries

Email: hello@mindflow.in
Subject line: "AI / Data Inquiry"
